pullRequest.title: TASK-17890 Add email validation to user registration API

issues.description: Missing 400 status code — endpoint returns 422 instead of 400 for invalid email, due to pydantic's built-in validation
Invalid email returns HTTP 422 instead of 400, test should be updated to assert 400 status code
Error message is not checked in test_invalid_email, test should be updated to assert 'Invalid email format' error message

results.reason: Code raises HTTPException with status_code=422, not 400, as seen in test_invalid_email
Error message is 'value is not a valid email address', not 'Invalid email format', as seen in test_invalid_email
